programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie receives a letter in which a relative boasts about how well her children are doing, and responds by enlisting Debra's help to concoct a fictitious catalogue of her own family's achievements. Doris Roberts and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes dancing lessons in preparation for a posh society ball, but his date falls ill at the last minute, so he asks Daphne to go with him instead. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Show Where Diane Comes Back
programme.desc: Diane visits Seattle for the opening night of her new play, which turns out to be a mixed blessing for Frasier. Although hurt over being jilted, he still harbours feelings for her - but they disappear once he attends the dress rehearsal. Shelley Long guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: A Word to the Wise Guy
programme.desc: A shady character helps the Crane brothers get Maris out of a spot of legal trouble - then demands they return the favour by persuading his girlfriend to marry him. Comedy, guest starring Harris Yulin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Jamie Laing, Victoria Smurfit and Bonnie Langford. With live music from James Smith

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer teaches an adult education course on the secrets of marital bliss. However, Marge spoils it by kicking him out of the house for revealing intimate domestic details to his students

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Northlands Farm in Chichester, where host Keith offers the full farm experience and an afternoon of paddleboarding on his very own lake

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire hosts the second visit of the week at the Mad Hatters Campsite in Ely, Cambridgeshire. Martha and Lisa love the Wonderland theme but Giovanni and Enzo are not happy with the lack of ensuite

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lisa and Martha host the third visit of the week at The Redan Inn in Chilcompton, Somerset. The guests love the quirky interiors and breakfast goes down a treat but Giovanni and Enzo get picky about plates

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Limes in Maldon, Essex. Hosts Giovanni and Enzo hope their luxurious rooms will impress their guests - and the B&Bers are certainly happy to drink in the additional extras at check-in. They spend the afternoon at nearby Radio Caroline, the famous pirate radio station on a boat in Chelmsford. Breakfast dazzles most of the guests, and Giovanni and Enzo think they're onto a winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day sees Keith try to get to the bottom of the concerning cleanliness score that's been bugging him. Lisa and Martha are also keen to uncover why Enzo and Giovanni weren't blown away by their breakfast, before the boys turn the tables to quiz their rivals about some fussy feedback

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head to Strathaven, Lanarkshire to help Frank and Wilma decide whether to sell their four-bedroom family home or invest in it to make it work for them. Frank is firmly on Team Love It, having raised their two children there, he is convinced they still have many happy years to come in the house, while Wilma is ready to sell now that their kids have flown the nest. Kirstie grapples with a poorly placed conservatory and a kitchen diner that struggles to fit the extend ed family in as she creates a plan to renovate while Phil is put through his paces trying to convince Frank to swap suburban life for sea views

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A man pays homage to one of the great modernist homes with his new garden room and George visits the teenager who created a shepherd's hut last year, to follow his latest build. George visits a bizarre garden folly inspired by a wedding cake, a striking beach house inspired by pill boxes and an old RNLI station. In Denmark, the architect checks out a stunning circular house inspired by the owner's car collection

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Judges Caroline Waldegrave and Paul Hollywood, and hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond, are joined in the tent by Jim Howick, Gloria Hunniford, Ellie Goldstein and Jamali Maddix. The bakers take on a retro recipe for brandy snaps in the signature, try not to be too cheesy in the technical and reveal all with a 'my best kept secret' cake showstopper

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Royal Princess docks in the small city of Ketchikan, where towering evergreens meet mist-shrouded mountains. Two of the ship's crew take part in a show celebrating the traditional skills and daring feats of North America's logging heritage. In Aomori in northern Japan, guests immerse themselves in the ritual of bathing in mountain hot springs

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the final performance at London's Hackney Empire. Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith must choose one of the five acts as the performance of the night. Chantel's a kidney transplant survivor, Findlay sings his mother's favourite song, teenager Milo stopped singing for two years after being teased, and for Iranian refugee Mina, singing was once an act of rebellion. Finally there's Elliot: a wildcard entry with the best smile in Britain

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on Prisoner, David Attenborough's 100 Years on Planet Earth, Countdown, First Dates, Scam Interceptors and news reports about the local elections and Keir Starmer

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Social activist Aaron is paired with youth worker and nightclub host Nathan - and while they might seem like strangers, their date leads to a twist neither of them is expecting. Former mayor Tracey meets toilet roll salesman Stuart, while barber Verity is paired with 6ft 5 Mancunian coach driver Liam. Burlesque dancer Double D, aka Deborah, is ready to steal the show, and maybe someone's heart. Her date Lee seems like the perfect match - a professional singer who is hoping to turn his solo act into a romantic duet

programme.title: Do You Know This Man?
programme.desc: The story of two women who, as teenagers in the 1990s, were groomed and sexually abused by a friend's father. Years later, as adults, the women recognised what had been done to them and reported it to police. But the case collapsed in court due to a procedural error and their abuser walked free. So Laura posted a public appeal on social media for other victims to come forward. In 2018, a third woman responded. This documentary traces three survivors' fight for justice, revealing the reality of grooming and the trauma of being disbelieved

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty nearly kills Homer after a bad TV review and hides out in a circus, but soon finds himself the centre of attention

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer teaches an adult education course on the secrets of marital bliss. However, Marge spoils it by kicking him out of the house for revealing intimate domestic details to his students

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Emma and James consider making a non-profit visitor attraction with all the rescue animals they have taken in

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes colourful recycled candles and a fun painted pebble game with her sons, and demonstrates how to make loo roll animals

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Rory Bremner joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Never Love a Goalie - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Carla's concern grows over the Boston Bruins' mysterious losing streak, and she decides the only possible cure is to end her relationship with goalkeeper Eddie. Rhea Perlman, Ted Danson and Shelley Long star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane agree to a pre-marital separation to rid their systems of any lustful urges, so the guys in the bar throw a bachelor party, complete with a special cake containing a girl. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff considers suing the owner of a dog that bit him on his round - until he discovers she is a beautiful woman who will do anything to avoid legal action

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra grudgingly agrees to let Ray have more involvement in the daily decision-making process, giving him the freedom to shop for grocery items he likes and choose where the family will go on holiday. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra, Ray and Amy get trapped at Frank and Marie's house during a snowstorm, but they actually find themselves having a good time - until an unguarded comment alters the mood. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the leader of local group the Frontier Girls is intending to sell a record number of cookies in his area, and sets out to beat her at her own game. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Amy Aquino

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is left jumping for joy by an exciting proposal from Maris, while Frasier suggests the family tries something different to mark the leap year. However, all his efforts end in disaster. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Disgruntled to learn his favourite table at Cafe Nervosa has been commandeered by a rude fellow customer, Frasier resorts to physical violence to reclaim it - but later regrets losing his temper

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin agrees to a game of chess against Frasier - who keeps losing successive rematches but has trouble accepting defeat graciously. Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Egos inflate to record proportions as the Crane brothers clash during a court battle to decide the mental competence of an eccentric millionaire. Guest starring Donald O'Connor

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Lincolnshire to meet mangle collector Colin, who's trying to find a home for his late father's possessions, including a motorbike won in a raffle

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: Mick and Julie's medieval hamlet has gruesome secrets buried in the walls. Norwich couple Ted and Lesa try to renovate a village in France while living in a tent. Londoner Penny is hoping to sell her beautifully restored Italian borgo

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Lucy Porter in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Lisa from Bedfordshire find the perfect holiday home for her and her family in northern Tenerife, known as the Island of Eternal Spring and famous for its volcanic black-sand beaches. With Lisa's husband Jonathan tied up with work, she brings along her best friend Jo to keep her from getting carried away while they're looking. Ben shows them five fabulous properties for Lisa's maximum budget of £300,000, from a quirky hilltop house to a detached 'castle' villa

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: St Patrick's Day is the busiest time of year for Northern Irish couple Seán and Áine, who own The Salty Shamrock pub and plan a dog show to raise local spirits after a hurricane. Down the coast in Sarasota, Yorkshireman Nick is putting on a Brits-only beach barbecue, much to the displeasure of his American housemate Jeff

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Charente, Sophie and Ray begin transforming a tower room into a bridal suite. But the space currently looks like a 1970s sauna and there are bird droppings in the ceiling. In Brittany, Donna and Paul face a balcony crisis and are forced to winch oversized flooring up the outside of their home

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Charlotte Rodriguez and her brother-in-law Damon search with Sara from Devon, who's decided to swap hospital beds for sun beds on the Spanish Costas after 34 years with the NHS. In Málaga, Shani and Andrew Hamilton line up three properties for Irish German couple Joy and Bernd and their two dogs

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: When it comes to dating etiquette, Breeze the American bulldog cross leaves a lot to be desired upon meeting Charlotte. Will the 31-year-old still fall for him though? Nettle the pointer would like some stability in her life, but it remains to be seen whether she can stay put long enough for any potential new owners to fall for her. The Woodgreen staff hope that Eileen from Middlesbrough will prove the ideal person to help nervy terrier Austin find his confidence

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Jason begins to lower his guard as he commits to individual therapy with Aisha. Ellen continues to flourish with surrogate partner therapist Kat, building confidence and emotional connection as she edges closer to a major personal breakthrough. Alex and Joy's relationship takes a significant step forward, as they become the first couple to spend private time together on the island

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The retreat enters its final phase. Bertie progresses to the bedroom with surrogate-partner therapist Kat and learns the lesson of a lifetime. Katie and Callum's romance intensifies as they choose to spend time alone together. Marianne faces her final sessions with surrogate partner Andre. Has she finally overcome her mistrust of men and is she now ready to go all the way with intimacy?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Miquita and Andi Oliver, Mo Gilligan with Babatunde Aléshé, Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Big Zuu, Hyder and Tubsey, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, and Denise van Outen and Duncan James comment on the week's TV. Programmes discussed include Glastonbury, Hijack, A Wright Family Holiday, Cocaine Bear, Below Deck Sailing Yacht, Puzzling and Antiques Roadshow. First shown in June 2023

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The case of a woman who claimed to have MS and conned her partner into running up huge debts to fund treatment, before falsely accusing him of domestic violence. When she threatened to kill herself in Japan, unless friends raise $20,000 that she claimed had been stolen, people started to question the truth of her stories and the FBI became involved

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The documentary picks up four months after the attempted assassination, when there was still no sign of the source of the Novichok. Salisbury re-opened after months under lockdown - only for civilians Dawn Sturgess and Charlie Rowley to fall ill in nearby Amesbury. As the death of the former turned it into a murder investigation, questions began to be asked about how well the UK reacted to such unprecedented Russian aggression and the stark security lessons that were learnt

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi and sketch comedian Doon Mackichan visit Donegal in the Republic of Ireland to see what it has to offer. Their first stop is at Tuath na Mara which boasts access to a secluded sandy cove, perfect for outdoor swimming enthusiast Doon. Sandi shares a personal confession and the pair go for an icy dip in the North Atlantic. Next, the duo stay at the eco-resort Lough Mardal Lodge where they meet miniature cows and share stories of Mongolian princesses. They end their adventure in the countryside just north of Donegal Bay where they stay in Candlewick Cottage in which Doon serenades Sandi with improvised comedy tunes on the piano

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mum's funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding, while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa seeks advice from an unlikely source

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family celebrates Maggie's birthday. Bart steals Homer's wallet to pay for an Itchy and Scratchy souvenir, and Grandma Bouvier is swept off her feet by Grampa - but Mr Burns provides romantic competition, convinced she is the woman for him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie gets a temporary job at Doug's company, much to his dismay. Arthur tries to persuade his friends to pose for a picture to go on a Christmas card

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Heffernans reminisce about moving into their house 10 years previously - and recall how Carrie had a tough job convincing a reluctant Doug, who was opposed to the change

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur wins $2,500 at a bingo game, but his decision to share part of his winnings with Doug and Carrie comes with its own set of rules - he will decide how they spend it. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert encounters a beautiful woman who learns his surname is Barone and mistakenly assumes he is Raymond - a situation he is quick to turn to his romantic advantage. Brad Garrett stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary

programme.title: Glass (2019)
programme.desc: An invulnerable vigilante battles a murderer with multiple personalities - only for both to be apprehended and transferred to a psychiatric hospital. They find themselves under the care of a sinister doctor who has plans concerning their unique abilities, but also sharing the facility with a third patient, a criminal mastermind the crime fighter had encountered before, and who is soon manipulating everyone to his own ends. M Night Shyamalan's fantasy thriller, crossing over the characters from his earlier films Unbreakable and Split. Starring James McAvoy, Bruce Willis and Samuel L Jackson

programme.desc: Ray discovers the leader of local group the Frontier Girls is intending to sell a record number of cookies in his area, and sets out to beat her at her own game. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Amy Aquino

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is left jumping for joy by an exciting proposal from Maris, while Frasier suggests the family tries something different to mark the leap year. However, all his efforts end in disaster. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Disgruntled to learn his favourite table at Cafe Nervosa has been commandeered by a rude fellow customer, Frasier resorts to physical violence to reclaim it - but later regrets losing his temper

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin agrees to a game of chess against Frasier - who keeps losing successive rematches but has trouble accepting defeat graciously. Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Egos inflate to record proportions as the Crane brothers clash during a court battle to decide the mental competence of an eccentric millionaire. Guest starring Donald O'Connor

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Lincolnshire to meet mangle collector Colin, who's trying to find a home for his late father's possessions, including a motorbike won in a raffle

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: Mick and Julie's medieval hamlet has gruesome secrets buried in the walls. Norwich couple Ted and Lesa try to renovate a village in France while living in a tent. Londoner Penny is hoping to sell her beautifully restored Italian borgo

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Lucy Porter in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Lisa from Bedfordshire find the perfect holiday home for her and her family in northern Tenerife, known as the Island of Eternal Spring and famous for its volcanic black-sand beaches. With Lisa's husband Jonathan tied up with work, she brings along her best friend Jo to keep her from getting carried away while they're looking. Ben shows them five fabulous properties for Lisa's maximum budget of £300,000, from a quirky hilltop house to a detached 'castle' villa

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: St Patrick's Day is the busiest time of year for Northern Irish couple Seán and Áine, who own The Salty Shamrock pub and plan a dog show to raise local spirits after a hurricane. Down the coast in Sarasota, Yorkshireman Nick is putting on a Brits-only beach barbecue, much to the displeasure of his American housemate Jeff

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Charente, Sophie and Ray begin transforming a tower room into a bridal suite. But the space currently looks like a 1970s sauna and there are bird droppings in the ceiling. In Brittany, Donna and Paul face a balcony crisis and are forced to winch oversized flooring up the outside of their home

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Charlotte Rodriguez and her brother-in-law Damon search with Sara from Devon, who's decided to swap hospital beds for sun beds on the Spanish Costas after 34 years with the NHS. In Málaga, Shani and Andrew Hamilton line up three properties for Irish German couple Joy and Bernd and their two dogs

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: When it comes to dating etiquette, Breeze the American bulldog cross leaves a lot to be desired upon meeting Charlotte. Will the 31-year-old still fall for him though? Nettle the pointer would like some stability in her life, but it remains to be seen whether she can stay put long enough for any potential new owners to fall for her. The Woodgreen staff hope that Eileen from Middlesbrough will prove the ideal person to help nervy terrier Austin find his confidence

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: Jason begins to lower his guard as he commits to individual therapy with Aisha. Ellen continues to flourish with surrogate partner therapist Kat, building confidence and emotional connection as she edges closer to a major personal breakthrough. Alex and Joy's relationship takes a significant step forward, as they become the first couple to spend private time together on the island

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The retreat enters its final phase. Bertie progresses to the bedroom with surrogate-partner therapist Kat and learns the lesson of a lifetime. Katie and Callum's romance intensifies as they choose to spend time alone together. Marianne faces her final sessions with surrogate partner Andre. Has she finally overcome her mistrust of men and is she now ready to go all the way with intimacy?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Social activist Aaron is paired with youth worker and nightclub host Nathan - and while they might seem like strangers, their date leads to a twist neither of them is expecting. Former mayor Tracey meets toilet roll salesman Stuart, while barber Verity is paired with 6ft 5 Mancunian coach driver Liam. Burlesque dancer Double D, aka Deborah, is ready to steal the show, and maybe someone's heart. Her date Lee seems like the perfect match - a professional singer who is hoping to turn his solo act into a romantic duet

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The crew of Warwickshire, Northamptonshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire and Rutland Air Ambulance race to reach Anthony, who's in traumatic cardiac arrest after coming off his motorbike at high speed. In Buckingham, Thames Valley Air Ambulance look after Carol after she's been trampled by a foal and in Eccles-on-Sea, Carter needs the help of the East Anglian Air Ambulance service after coming off his jet ski. In Brundall, teenager Harry has an open leg fracture after walking in front of a car

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The documentary picks up four months after the attempted assassination, when there was still no sign of the source of the Novichok. Salisbury re-opened after months under lockdown - only for civilians Dawn Sturgess and Charlie Rowley to fall ill in nearby Amesbury. As the death of the former turned it into a murder investigation, questions began to be asked about how well the UK reacted to such unprecedented Russian aggression and the stark security lessons that were learnt

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi and sketch comedian Doon Mackichan visit Donegal in the Republic of Ireland to see what it has to offer. Their first stop is at Tuath na Mara which boasts access to a secluded sandy cove, perfect for outdoor swimming enthusiast Doon. Sandi shares a personal confession and the pair go for an icy dip in the North Atlantic. Next, the duo stay at the eco-resort Lough Mardal Lodge where they meet miniature cows and share stories of Mongolian princesses. They end their adventure in the countryside just north of Donegal Bay where they stay in Candlewick Cottage in which Doon serenades Sandi with improvised comedy tunes on the piano

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Dave and Lynn need help with the layout and decoration of their living room, while Kay plans her first ever craft fair

programme.title: Police Squad!
programme.desc: Frank Drebin investigates the case of a man murdered twice but killed only once, and discovers a beautiful blonde is being threatened by her dentist. First episode of the comedy that inspired the Naked Gun movies, starring Leslie Nielsen

programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joey's agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. programme.desc: In May 2012, six children aged between five and 13 died at the hands of their parents Mick and Mairead Philpott in a house fire in Derby. The blaze was started as an attempt to frame the former mistress of father-of-17 Mick, and despite tearful appearances in front of the TV cameras, the couple were convicted of manslaughter months later. This documentary features interviews with eyewitnesses and neighbours who tried to save the children

programme.title: Look What You Made Me Do

The shows featured include I Can See Your Voice, Mastermind, Nadiya, Ready to Mingle, Line of Duty, The Mating Game, Petrol News, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Strictly Come Dancing, Squid Game, An Audience with Adele, Headspace Guide to Sleep, Vigil, Life Drawing Live, Sex, Love & Goop, and Coronation Street

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.desc: Trilogy of spooky stories. A murderous Krusty doll terrorises Homer, Mr Burns travels to a remote island to capture a giant ape and Bart's attempt to resurrect the family's dead cat Snowball goes disastrously wrong

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Guilt-stricken at having spent all the family's Christmas money on himself, Homer resolves to turn over a new leaf and become a do-gooder - but his kindness soon starts to rival that of Ned Flanders, and the neighbours embark on a battle for supremacy

Action thriller, starring Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Cam try to sell the house they bought, but when the estate agent's negotiations fall through, they are forced to woo a potential buyer and seal the deal themselves. Tensions bubble over at the Pritchetts' when Javier drops by with his new girlfriend, with Gloria taking an immediate dislike to her ex's latest flame - especially when the woman strikes up a bond with Manny

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart plays a prank on Mrs Krabappel, but it backfires badly and results in her being fired, leaving him feeling so guilty that he resolves to do everything he can to get her reinstated - even if it means discrediting her replacement

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.desc: A family trip to the school fair proves eventful for Phil and Claire, while Haley's relaxing day by the pool is interrupted by an awkward encounter with 'manny' Andy and Jay is unimpressed when Gloria signs him up for 'cop duties'

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a children's news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockman's book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is appointed Springfield's new sanitation commissioner, but finds it so hard to keep his elaborate election promises that he is forced to spend the year's budget allocation in his first month in charge. Featuring the guest voices of U2 and Steve Martin

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Two company executives hire Homer to climb Springfield's most treacherous mountain, the ominously named Murderhorn, as a promotional stunt for their energy bar product. With the guest voice of Brendan Fraser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Guilt begins to consume Charlie and he admits to Frankie that he's ready to hand himself in. Distracting himself from recent events, Tony attempts to fix the broken oven at the Hutch

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart misbehaves once too often, prompting Homer and Marge to impose a terrible punishment - banning him from ever going to see the new feature-length Itchy and Scratchy film, and standing firm despite his constant pleas

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating

programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Twenty five-year-old groom Colin hopes his efforts to organise a Willy Wonka-themed wedding will please his 24-year-old bride-to-be Sally. However, preparing the ceremony while holding two jobs proves a massive task, and his penchant for playing pranks threatens to turn his big day into a children's birthday party

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ian returns from the Merchant Navy and receives £12,000 to fund his wedding. However, he must plan a big day that will adhere to the traditions of his bride Reanna's Greek Cypriot family

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Tom from Bristol is given £12,000 to organise a dream wedding for his fiancee Lotty, who was unable to celebrate her 18th and 21st birthdays after her mother died of cervical cancer

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Berkshire, beauty therapist Emma and her boyfriend Sean kick off the week with an night of acronyms, pet names and fine food. Finally, Mel and Tony host with a menu filled with traditional British classics in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Surrey, competitive American Laura and her English husband James, treat their guests to a Tex Mex evening. On day two, Sarah and Dan have a special treat in store for their guests that nobody expects. Retired estates manager Edward and teacher Carol are accustomed to hosting dinner parties, so they aren't concerned about the competition. With rapping, monobrows, secret revelations and some fine food, the competition is wide open

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bike restorer Ian and his Lithuanian-born fiancee Loretta kick off the competition in Stockport with dishes inspired by their Indian and Lithuanian heritage. Day two sees Gemma and Emily, aka 'Gemily', attempt to woo their guests with their Moroccan-themed menu. Finally, it's Tim and Luan's chance to show the other couples how it should be done as they offer up a taste of their favourite dishes

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. The heated contest continues as Armando Iannucci douses a coconut in vinegar while Joel Dommett slathers another in glue. And Little Alex Horne causes Joanna Page to scream in such terror that it sparks alarm in the local area

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.desc: The comedian and his mother travel across America , beginning by heading to Nevada in search of evidence of UFOs and alien life

programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Los Angeles-based fast food restaurant Fatburger, goes incognito among his employees in order to learn more about his business that has evolved from a late-night hangout for musicians in the 1950s to an international success story

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the company's front-line employees

Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Trilogy of spooky stories. A murderous Krusty doll terrorises Homer, Mr Burns travels to a remote island to capture a giant ape and Bart's attempt to resurrect the family's dead cat Snowball goes disastrously wrong

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Guilt-stricken at having spent all the family's Christmas money on himself, Homer resolves to turn over a new leaf and become a do-gooder - but his kindness soon starts to rival that of Ned Flanders, and the neighbours embark on a battle for supremacy

Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Meanwhile, Gina's psychic friend Carlene visits the precinct to help with a case, and upsets Charles with a prediction about his romantic life. American comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants that he set out to save, including the Mixing Bowl, the Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have their owners pulled themselves out of their nightmares?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke spend father-son time together searching for hidden treasures beneath the house, Mitch and Cam cause embarrassment by inviting Lily's paediatrician to lunch, and Haley takes her driving test

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer decides to skip church so he can enjoy himself watching TV, making waffles and dancing semi-naked in the guise of Tom Cruise. When he subsequently experiences a vision from God, the lazy father is inspired to start his own religion. Animated comedy, with the voice of Dan Castellaneta

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer enters Lisa in a beauty pageant to boost her self-esteem, and has the satisfaction of seeing her crowned runner-up - but she finds her principles heavily compromised as a result. Featuring the voice of Bob Hope

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Trilogy of spooky stories. A murderous Krusty doll terrorises Homer, Mr Burns travels to a remote island to capture a giant ape and Bart's attempt to resurrect the family's dead cat Snowball goes disastrously wrong

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Guilt-stricken at having spent all the family's Christmas money on himself, Homer resolves to turn over a new leaf and become a do-gooder - but his kindness soon starts to rival that of Ned Flanders, and the neighbours embark on a battle for supremacy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Marge v Singles, Seniors, Childless Couples and Teens, and Gays
programme.desc: A baby riot breaks out at a children's concert in Springfield, so the town's childless community forms an anti-youth lobby. The initiative threatens to eliminate all child-friendly aspects of the area, until Marge decides to fight back with a cunning plan of her own

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: On Borneo, the final four teams get hands-on gutting fish at a bustling market and dive headfirst into a conservation mission. However, saving the planet takes a toll on the would-be eco warriors

programme.title: I, Robot (2004)
programme.desc: The inventor of an advanced form of intelligent robot is found dead, and the detective investigating the case is certain that one of the scientist's mechanical creations is responsible - but no one believes his theory because the robots have been programmed to prevent them from harming humans. Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: White House Down (2013)
programme.desc: A policeman is turned down for his dream job as a secret service bodyguard to the president. While taking his daughter on a tour of the White House, he gets the chance to prove himself when terrorists seize control of the building, putting the head of state's life in his hands. Action thriller, starring Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Highlights of the year's episodes, featuring memorable appearances by the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Marcus and Mica, and Amira and Iqra as they share their opinions and lively discussions based on the best and worst TV of 2021. programme.title: James Martin: Sweet

programme.title: James Martin: Sweet

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's spice week, and Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task contestants with a teatime favourite signature. The technical means the bakers are tested with a tricky Arabian pastry. And finally they take on a fiddly showstopper that promises to be anything but light work. Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers are tested to the limit in pastry week, including an ambitious final challenge that sees them pushed to the edge creating a majestic pie fit for a banquet. Before that, the signature challenge centres on samosas, with a sweet and a savoury option required, and there is a classic French technical involving two types of pastry. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide which of the bakers has to leave the competition, with Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig on hand for some emotional support and encouragement

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: For the very first time on the show, vegan week takes place. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood have set three very different challenges to test the remaining bakers - a savoury pastry signature, with no butter involved, a technical with a very unusual ingredient and a spectacular showstopper that in the heat of the tent threatens to lead to catastrophe. Who will keep their cool and win star baker? And who will be meeting their end? As ever, Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding are on hand to lend support to the contestants

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Danish week, and the bakers face unfamiliar recipes as they battle to impress the judges. There's a bread challenge signature, where they must demonstrate style as well substance. Paul Hollywood sets a spherical technical - and with a place in the semi-final at stake, everyone is out to impress him and Prue Leith. For their final challenge, the bakers must deliver an elaborate pastry showstopper fit for a Danish birthday party

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Only four bakers remain as the semi-final arrives. This week, the contestants must demonstrate their mastery of patisserie in three more challenges. However, the stakes have never been higher, and a disaster in any one of the rounds might mean the difference between claiming a place in the final, or bowing out early. In the Signature, the bakers must achieve perfect lamination on French pastries, and in the Technical, Paul Hollywood puts the amateurs through their paces with a yeast-based cake with a fruity top and delicate chocolate work. For the showstopper finale, the competitors face a multiple mini-cake bake, with Paul and fellow judge Mary Berry expecting a high-end finish that demonstrates the bakers' ability to manage their time

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the 2018 grand final, as the three remaining bakers compete to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith and take home the trophy. For the final three challenges, they must prepare and decorate doughnuts, followed by a deceptively simple technical, and climaxing with an intricate, multi-layered, edible landscape showstopper

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: The food writer demonstrates how spicy food works well with a cool accompaniment, preparing a chicken curry and tomato stew with yoghurt, as well as a new version of a traditional pudding. He also visits Bristol, where he meets a man who is passionate about pepper and combines it with a dish of soft fruit

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: The food writer turns his attention to texture, demonstrating how it can be used to make food stand out. Among other things he prepares a classic savoury pie with a puff pastry crust, and a re-imagining of his favourite childhood pudding - poached pears. He also visits a seafront smokery in Brighton, where he meets a couple who make a soft and crisp recipe

programme.title: Jamie's Meat-Free Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a simple sticky onion tart, as well as a creamy coconut pumpkin rice with a spicy butter bean stew. He learns traditional ways to stuff vegetables in the Middle East, then turbo-charges aubergines with Indian spices

programme.title: Jamie's Meat-Free Meals
programme.desc: The former Naked Chef himself Jamie Oliver demonstrates more vibrant, hearty and healthy vegetarian dishes that everyone can add to their kitchen. In this final instalment, Jamie creates a beautiful oozy risotto with roasted tomatoes, and on a visit to Jerusalem, he is inspired by gorgeous breakfasts and rustles up pancakes supercharged with spinach, cheese and chilli. He also visits a cookery class with a healthy twist, and produces a show-stopping summer veg pie packed with plenty of good stuff

programme.desc: Ina gives traditional Thanksgiving dinner dishes a modern twist, with Tuscan turkey roulade, chipotle smashed sweet potatoes and pumpkin flan

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Nurse and private investigator Nikki and Jimmy Cappello are a dynamic duo - until Jimmy suddenly goes missing

programme.title: A Body in the Basement
programme.desc: In rural Pennsylvania, a home refurb reveals a skeleton in the basement. Police uncover a decades-old missing persons case and a grisly family secret

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Kayla's mother pays the ultimate price when she breaks free of her husband, Richard, and he plots a final and brutal revenge

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: The murder of a radio station intern, which heralded a long and frustrating investigation. Eventually, forensic genealogy led to a man on the run for decades

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The case of 32-year-old of Stephanie McClurg, whose 35-year-old husband Jason was convicted of poisoning, intending it to look like a drug overdose

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Matt and Nique Leili's love story was a modern romance - they met online, created a blended family and appeared to have it all. However, in 2011 their seemingly happy marriage was torn apart for ever and Matt stood accused of murdering his wife and dropping her body in the woods near their home

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: When Vegas showgirl Debbie Flores Narvaez goes missing, investigators wonder if a jealous rival is responsible

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Time Is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quiz in which contestants are given their prize money before they have answered a question, and must race against time to keep hold of it. Each player stands before an hourglass-shaped money timer that begins to drain as the questions are asked - and the only way of stopping it is to answer correctly. Once the money is gone, the contestant is out - and only one can make the final to play for the amount they have managed to save

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The team races against time to catch a psychotic killer preying on nurses, who sends his victims flowers before stalking them. American drama, starring William Shatner

He plans to use the assignment as cover to smuggle weapons to the Southern forces, but ends up defending his territory from a corrupt saloon owner and the Apaches he has been arming. Western, starring Howard Keel and Yvonne De Carlo

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.title: Red Sun (1971)
programme.desc: A Japanese ambassador travelling through the Wild West is held up by outlaws, who steal a ceremonial sword. The diplomat's bodyguard joins forces with a betrayed member of the gang to take down the bandits and recover the priceless blade. Spaghetti Western, starring Charles Bronson and Toshiro Mifune

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Newlyweds discover a machine that can predict the future. Guest starring William Shatner

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young girl asks for her family's robot servants to be dismantled _ but isn't prepared for what happens next. Inger Stevens stars

programme.title: King Arthur (2004)
programme.desc: A Roman commander is posted to Britain in the last days of the empire and given a final mission to rescue a high-ranking official and his son stranded in the north. However, the endeavour reveals his true destiny is to lead the Britons against the new Saxon invasion, and marks the start of a legend. Historical adventure, starring Clive Owen, Keira Knightley, Ray Winstone, Ioan Gruffudd and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: Red Sonja (1985)
programme.desc: A female warrior resolves to stop an evil queen unleashing the destructive power of a magical orb that controls the elements, and make the malevolent monarch pay for murdering her family. Fantasy adventure, starring Brigitte Nielsen, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sandahl Bergman, Ronald Lacey and Pat Roach

programme.title: Vendetta (2013)
programme.desc: Jimmy Vickers, a rogue SAS officer specialising in interrogation techniques, sets out to take vengeance on the criminal gang that murdered his parents. However, his brutal crusade is placed in jeopardy when it becomes clear the police have teamed up with members of his old unit to stop him completing his mission. Action thriller, starring Danny Dyer, Roxanne McKee and Vincent Regan

programme.title: The Hunter's Prayer (2017)
programme.desc: A drug-addled assassin goes rogue, opting to protect rather than take out his latest target. Action thriller, starring Sam Worthington, Odeya Rush and Allen Leech

Seafaring adventure, with Fred MacMurray, Vera Ralston and Robert Douglas

Thriller, starring Burt Reynolds and Arthur Kennedy

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk has a hair-raising encounter with Greek god Apollo on a distant planet, and is forced to decide whether to worship the arrogant deity or enrage him. Vintage sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve's rekindled romance with an old flame is disrupted when she becomes the target of kidnappers

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Corrigan's girlfriend is murdered, so Stacy goes undercover at the victim's aerobics class in an effort to glean information on likely suspects. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Part two of two. The rangers try to thwart a murder plot as Walker and Alex prepare for their wedding day. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: Stealth (2005)
programme.desc: Three highly skilled fighter pilots are less than thrilled when a new computer with artificial intelligence is brought in to assist in flying a state-of-the-art jet. However, the trio are left to pick up the pieces when the machine is struck by lightning and begins to malfunction, leading to a chaotic battle to stop the jet from starting an all-out war. Action adventure, starring Jamie Foxx, Jessica Biel and Josh Lucas

programme.title: Maximum Conviction (2012)
programme.desc: Two special forces agents are given the task of transporting a pair of female convicts to prison, only to come under attack by a mercenary force sent to kill them. When they discover the true identity of the women in their charge, they realise the situation is even more dangerous than it seems. Action adventure, starring Steven Seagal and Steve Austin

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesn't stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: Ambushed (2013)
programme.desc: A DEA agent tries to bring down a cocaine smuggling syndicate, and rescue an undercover operative who has infiltrated the gang but found herself in over her head. The assignment is threatened by police officers in the pay of the drug lord running the operation. Action thriller, starring Dolph Lundgren and Vinnie Jones

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man suffers serious spinal injuries after falling off a mountain bike. As doctors assess the extent of the damage, his wife recalls growing up in apartheid-era South Africa. A medical team gives emergency oxygen to an 83-year-old woman who is struggling to breathe, and a woman is rushed to A&E after her daughter accidently crashed into a lamp post

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A night out with friends ends badly when a car crashes into two vehicles as police, firefighters and the paramedics attend the scene. In Birmingham, a young woman is found lying collapsed and unconscious in a car park, a family night in playing board games ends with a man lying unconscious on the kitchen floor and a young woman whose gall bladder operation has been postponed due to the Covid-19 pandemic cannot cope with the pain any longer

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ex-paratrooper Martin, who's 48, has sustained multiple life-changing injuries to his neck, pelvis and legs after his paraglider was blown into a hillside, and is rushed to hospital by emergency helicopter. Meanwhile, doctors treat 73-year-old Eddie for severe sepsis, and 72-year-old Graham, suffering from a constant nose bleed due to the blood-thinners he is taking, is also treated

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Glyn, 53, is brought in by ambulance after a work-related accident on a building site, and in his hour of need he turns to his lifelong friend Barrie. Eighteen-month-old Zemirah's parents are concerned with her diarrhoea and vomiting and 93-year-old John is admitted after falling at home, but also has a severe case of sepsis

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire, Kate Quilton sees whether shallots are actually just small onions and visits a potato farm looking for the reason baking potatoes cost more. Matt Tebbutt heads to frozen food company McCain to see how potatoes are transformed into their various products, most notably chips. Helen Lawal is in Spain to find out why it is possible to get sheep's cheese in the supermarket, but never sheep's milk

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Children's food educator Beth Stephens hosts the first dinner party in Lowestoft, Suffolk, where she plans to impress her guests - caravan site owner Ray, beauty therapist Polly, housing officer Jonalt and ASBO officer Rachel - with locally sourced seasonal food. However, she and Rachel gang up on Ray for most of the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Caravan park owner Ray hosts the second night in Lowestoft, where he hopes to win the £1,000 prize with a Spanish-themed evening, complete with a homemade tropical zone and an Ibiza-style club night in a barn - despite it being the middle of winter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Luxury-loving beautician Polly hosts the third evening in Lowestoft, Suffolk, and is determined to prove she is more than just a pretty face. She opts for a fine-dining menu that stresses quality over quantity, and hopes her smart dress code will bring out the genteel side of her guests - but distractions soon emerge in the form of revelations about Ray once being a new romantic

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Albanian-born civil servant Jonalt hosts the fourth party of the competition in Lowestoft, Suffolk, and hopes his family recipes can impress his guests. He demonstrates a hidden talent that makes the diners laugh, and one contestant is left feeling the heat when Beth and Rachel unite

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final dinner party in Suffolk is hosted by anti-social behaviour officer Rachel, who hopes to win over her guests with an evening of comfort food and a few tricks up her sleeve. She hates to lose, but will need to curb her comments towards the other guests and let her dishes do the talking if she wants to be in with a chance of beating joint leaders Holly and Jonalt

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps house-hunters Jo and Graham find their dream holiday home in Mar Menor, Europe's largest coastal lagoon, on Spain's Costa Blanca

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Claire and Gary find their dream property in the north of Fuerteventura around the buzzing town of Corralejo. Over the years, they've enjoyed many happy family holidays on the island with their twin daughters, who although now grown up will be joining them in their winter bolthole, where the couple are looking forward to creating new fond memories. Working to their budget of £200,000, Jasmine sets out to find them the perfect abode

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps father and daughter Stephen and Stephanie, who are moving to the French region of Poitou-Charentes with Stephanie's young son Carter. They are hoping to set up their own glamping business, and want a character property with outside space on a budget of £250,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer travels back to Cambridgeshire to catch up with a couple he and Kirstie Allsopp first met three years ago when they were struggling with what to do with their three-bed semi. Amber Brammah, who was leading fitness classes from the garage, wanted a new house with more room to run her business, while ecologist husband Martin preferred the idea of renovating. Having made their decision, how have things changed in the 36 months since?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect helps more people make their period homes fit for modern life. George looks to Japan for inspiration as he helps Rachel and Sarah with the ground floor of their Victorian terraced home in Worthing. In Worcestershire, he meets a young couple who have bitten off more than they can chew in the shape of a listed 17th-century cottage

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Suzi and Andrew from Barnsley, South Yorkshire, are looking for a holiday home in Charente, western France. For their budget of £100,000, they'd like a rural property with three bedrooms that is still within walking distance of amenities. Sara Damergi shows them five options to choose between that should meet their demands

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Former firefighter Paul and partner Julia want to buy a holiday home in southern Tenerife, where they plan to spend up to half the year. The pair ask Laura Hamilton to help find them a property with a pool and enough space for their family to visit within their 180,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Tideswell in the Peak District for the week's first visit, where brothers Richard and Mick host at their pub The George Inn. Everyone explores each other's hidden depths during an afternoon in a cave, and one pair of hosts impress everyone else when they reveal their wealth of experience. Unfortunately, Richard and Mick are less impressed by some cleanliness scores that they just can't brush off

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Laura and Lucy host the week's second visit, at Clementine's Guest House in York. With an amazing location and an impressive breakfast, the rest of the group seem worried about their chances in the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hosts Jonny and Sasha encourage all of their guests to relax in the idyll of their awe-inspiring rural setting at Haystacks Country Retreats in Birstwith, North Yorkshire. The group all get on swimmingly during an afternoon spent in some rowing boats in nearby Knaresborough, ensuring there's no needle at Haystacks

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to Cherry Tree Guest House in Bridlington on the East Yorkshire coast, where hosts Simon and Carol are nervous about being judged by their peers. It turns out they needn't have worried, with plenty of praise from the B&Bers for their rooms. However, one of them subsequently finds a hair in a drawer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After the high drama of stray hairs in drawers and grumbles about not having somewhere convenient to put a towel, the week draws to a close with payment day. Who will emerge victorious from all of that rip-roaring madness?

programme.title: The Emergency Ward

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two sets of serial renters who had very particular tastes, beginning with serial renters Mike and Poppy. Mike has lived in 18 homes, but Poppy wants to put down roots and they've chosen Cheshire as the right spot for their family. However, living in a high spec rental has given them great expectations for the home they'd love to own. Meanwhile, James and Hayley are looking for a rural retreat for themselves and their two dogs in Swindon and Newbury. But they are the first ones to admit that their wish list is extravagant, making Phil Spencer's job a tough one

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce returns with the music quiz, with the first heat featuring five players testing their musical knowledge as they attempt to win a place in the grand final

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: On Iona, sheep farmer Joanne cares for the family's flock, but also plays an integral role in wool production on the island, resulting in a product that's unique to the island. Meanwhile, 350 miles away on Lundy Island, we meet employees of the Lundy Company who are able to live on the island by virtue of their jobs there. On North Uist, Alexander is using his skills acquired as a gardener on the mainland to reinvigorate his nine-and-a-half-acre croft

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Rich, 35, is airlifted to the hospital after being involved in a high-speed collision on the M25, and doctors are concerned when they discover he has lost feeling below his chest and can't move his legs. Meanwhile, 36-year-old Justin has had a life-threatening accident while playing football and he is put into an induced coma while a CT scan is carried out, which reveals a potentially life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A baby has a dangerously high temperature and the paramedics suspect sepsis, and a woman who is pregnant and has tested positive for Covid-19 has had a migraine for seven days. A woman has a blood pressure reading that's barely detectable. She is so ill, the paramedics are concerned that she may not survive a trip to hospital
